channel.title: Latest from Android Central
channel.description: All the latest content from the Android Central team

item.title: TikTokers are swapping their iPhones for Nothing Phones, and I think I understand why
item.description: The Nothing brand has been growing at an exponential rate, and it looks like a heavy TikTok influence is playing a big role.
item.dc:creator: Nicholas Sutrich

media:content.media:description: A Nothing Phone 3a Pro and an iPhone 14 Pro Max
media:content.media:text: A Nothing Phone 3a Pro and an iPhone 14 Pro Max
media:content.media:title: A Nothing Phone 3a Pro and an iPhone 14 Pro Max

item.title: Messy cables driving you crazy? This magnetic USB-C cable might be the solution
item.description: Too many cables getting tangled up and creating a mess? Whether it's your desk or bedside table, this magnetic cable presents a tidy solution.
item.author: namerah.saud-fatmi@futurenet.com (Namerah Saud Fatmi)
item.dc:creator: Namerah Saud Fatmi

media:content.media:description: Various USB-C cables and an Android figurine on a wooden desk
media:content.media:text: Various USB-C cables and an Android figurine on a wooden desk
media:content.media:title: Various USB-C cables and an Android figurine on a wooden desk

item.title: Fitbit Air vs. Google Pixel Watch 4: Both might be better than just one
item.description: Google's Fitbit Air is a screenless fitness tracker for those who don't want a full-blown smartwatch — but it doesn't have to be at odds with the Pixel Watch 4.
item.author: bradypsnyder@gmail.com (Brady Snyder)
item.dc:creator: Brady Snyder

media:content.media:description: The Fitbit Air wrapped around a Pixel Watch 4
media:content.media:text: The Fitbit Air wrapped around a Pixel Watch 4
media:content.media:title: The Fitbit Air wrapped around a Pixel Watch 4

item.title: The Sennheiser Momentum 5 sets the standard for its mix of longevity, price, and great sound
item.description: Better sound, battery life, and longevity than Sony and Bose make the Sennheiser Momentum 5 a top pick for music lovers!
item.author: klpmediallc@gmail.com (Tshaka Armstrong)
item.dc:creator: Tshaka Armstrong

media:content.media:description: Sennheiser Momentum 5 headphones on a desk with a FiiO M21 DAP
media:content.media:text: Sennheiser Momentum 5 headphones on a desk with a FiiO M21 DAP
media:content.media:title: Sennheiser Momentum 5 headphones on a desk with a FiiO M21 DAP

item.title: Oura Ring 5 vs. Oura Ring 4: Slimmer, and still with a subscription
item.description: The Oura Ring 5 is better than the Ring 4 in just about every way, but its $400 or $500 price tag stings — especially combined with the required subscription.
item.author: bradypsnyder@gmail.com (Brady Snyder)
item.dc:creator: Brady Snyder

media:content.media:description: Oura Ring 5 vs. Oura Ring 4
media:content.media:text: Oura Ring 5 vs. Oura Ring 4
media:content.media:title: Oura Ring 5 vs. Oura Ring 4

item.title: The Circular Ring 2 is a decent, subscription-free Oura alternative, but it misses out on what made Circular rings truly unique
item.description: The Circular Ring 2 gets many of the basics down, but aside from the lack of a subscription (for now), I can't imagine why anyone would buy this over the Oura Ring.
item.author: derrek.lee@futurenet.com (Derrek Lee)
item.dc:creator: Derrek Lee

media:content.media:description: Circular Ring 2 next to a billiard ball
media:content.media:text: Circular Ring 2 next to a billiard ball
media:content.media:title: Circular Ring 2 next to a billiard ball

item.title: Oh, happy day: Samsung might've started One UI 9 tests on the Galaxy S25
item.description: An internal build of One UI 9 was reportedly spotted for the Galaxy S25 series.
item.author: nickodiaz@sbcglobal.net (Nickolas Diaz)
item.dc:creator: Nickolas Diaz

media:content.media:description: Comparing the display size on the Samsung Galaxy S25 with the Samsung Galaxy S25 Plus
media:content.media:text: Comparing the display size on the Samsung Galaxy S25 with the Samsung Galaxy S25 Plus
media:content.media:title: Comparing the display size on the Samsung Galaxy S25 with the Samsung Galaxy S25 Plus

item.title: Google Chrome tests another massive change to Search that puts AI in front
item.description: Google reportedly started testing a huge change to Chrome's Search experience that's all about AI, not a list of relevant links.
item.author: nickodiaz@sbcglobal.net (Nickolas Diaz)
item.dc:creator: Nickolas Diaz

media:content.media:description: Google Chrome icon on a laptop screen
media:content.media:text: Google Chrome icon on a laptop screen
media:content.media:title: Google Chrome icon on a laptop screen

item.title: Google just pulled the plug on Pixel's AI image generator
item.description: Google has shut down Pixel Studio's AI image generation features with its latest update.
item.author: sanujb6@gmail.com (Sanuj Bhatia)
item.dc:creator: Sanuj Bhatia

media:content.media:description: Generating art using the Pixel Studio app on a Google Pixel 9 Pro XL
media:content.media:text: Generating art using the Pixel Studio app on a Google Pixel 9 Pro XL
media:content.media:title: Generating art using the Pixel Studio app on a Google Pixel 9 Pro XL

item.title: Rumors kick up Xiaomi 18 Pro hype, and it's exactly what we expected
item.description: Xiaomi's next flagship series gets caught up in rumors, and they claim the Dynamic Back Display is returning with some sweet upgrades.
item.author: nickodiaz@sbcglobal.net (Nickolas Diaz)
item.dc:creator: Nickolas Diaz

media:content.media:description: Xiaomi 17 Pro Max render in hands showing two colors
media:content.media:text: Xiaomi 17 Pro Max render in hands showing two colors
media:content.media:title: Xiaomi 17 Pro Max render in hands showing two colors

item.title: Early Prime Day Google Pixel deals 2026 — score $250 off Pixel 10 phones, weeks before the big sale starts
item.description: Weeks before Prime Day officially kicks off, Amazon is slashing up to 25% off Pixel 10 phones, wearables, and more.
item.author: patrick.farmer@futurenet.com (Patrick Farmer)
item.dc:creator: Patrick Farmer

media:content.media:description: The backs of the Jade and Obsidian Pixel 10 Pro's alongside the Moonstone and Porcelain Pixel 10 Pro XL models
media:content.media:text: The backs of the Jade and Obsidian Pixel 10 Pro's alongside the Moonstone and Porcelain Pixel 10 Pro XL models
media:content.media:title: The backs of the Jade and Obsidian Pixel 10 Pro's alongside the Moonstone and Porcelain Pixel 10 Pro XL models

item.title: Chrome is faster than ever thanks to a massive under-the-hood overhaul
item.description: Chrome just crushed its own speed records with massive under-the-hood engine upgrades, making your everyday web browsing ridiculously fast.
item.author: techkritiko@gmail.com (Jay Bonggolto)
item.dc:creator: Jay Bonggolto

media:content.media:description: Google Chrome lifestyle
media:content.media:text: Google Chrome lifestyle
media:content.media:title: Google Chrome lifestyle

item.title: Google Wallet just fixed the most annoying part of online checkout
item.description: Google is finally fixing the headache of online checkouts by turning your Wallet into a private identity vault that instantly proves who you are without spilling your secrets.
item.author: techkritiko@gmail.com (Jay Bonggolto)
item.dc:creator: Jay Bonggolto

media:content.media:description: College IDs sitting next to an Android phone with the Google Wallet app logo
media:content.media:text: College IDs sitting next to an Android phone with the Google Wallet app logo
media:content.media:title: College IDs sitting next to an Android phone with the Google Wallet app logo

item.title: My favorite Gboard upgrade looks ready to launch, and I can't wait
item.description: Google appears close to launching its Rambler voice-to-text feature in Gboard.
item.author: sanujb6@gmail.com (Sanuj Bhatia)
item.dc:creator: Sanuj Bhatia

media:content.media:description: Holding a Google Pixel 10 Pro XL while looking at the homescreen with weather and Gemini widgets on it
media:content.media:text: Holding a Google Pixel 10 Pro XL while looking at the homescreen with weather and Gemini widgets on it
media:content.media:title: Holding a Google Pixel 10 Pro XL while looking at the homescreen with weather and Gemini widgets on it

item.title: Apple's latest Android joke would have made sense 10 years ago — not in 2026
item.description: Modern Android phones are many things, but they're not whatever this ad is showing.
item.author: sanujb6@gmail.com (Sanuj Bhatia)
item.dc:creator: Sanuj Bhatia

media:content.media:description: Apple iPhone 17 review on Android Central
media:content.media:text: Apple iPhone 17 review on Android Central
media:content.media:title: Apple iPhone 17 review on Android Central

item.title: Samsung could return Snapdragon chips to Galaxy Z Flip 8 in 'some' areas
item.description: Galaxy Z Flip 8 rumors returned, and they suggest Qualcomm is back on the table.
item.author: nickodiaz@sbcglobal.net (Nickolas Diaz)
item.dc:creator: Nickolas Diaz

media:content.media:description: The Samsung Galaxy Z Flip 7.
media:content.media:text: The Samsung Galaxy Z Flip 7.
media:content.media:title: The Samsung Galaxy Z Flip 7.

item.title: Your Android Auto just got a calling upgrade — here's what to know
item.description: Google Meet is rolling out to Android Auto with an audio-only calling experience.
item.author: sanujb6@gmail.com (Sanuj Bhatia)
item.dc:creator: Sanuj Bhatia

media:content.media:description: YouTube Music and Google Maps on Android Auto
media:content.media:text: YouTube Music and Google Maps on Android Auto
media:content.media:title: YouTube Music and Google Maps on Android Auto

item.title: I found the easiest way to transfer files between Android and Windows
item.description: I didn't know Quick Share was on Windows, but I installed the app a month ago, and it's transformed how I share data between my phone and my Windows machine.
item.author: harish.jonnalagadda@futurenet.com (Harish Jonnalagadda)
item.dc:creator: Harish Jonnalagadda

media:content.media:description: Quick Share on Android showing available devices
media:content.media:text: Quick Share on Android showing available devices
media:content.media:title: Quick Share on Android showing available devices

item.title: Thought OnePlus was struggling? The OnePlus 16 could be closer than anyone expected
item.description: The OnePlus 16 may arrive sooner than previous flagship launches, according to a trusted source.
item.author: sanujb6@gmail.com (Sanuj Bhatia)
item.dc:creator: Sanuj Bhatia

media:content.media:description: OnePlus 15 camera review on Android Central
media:content.media:text: OnePlus 15 camera review on Android Central
media:content.media:title: OnePlus 15 camera review on Android Central

item.title: Samsung Health app is all new: preps features to take the guesswork out of your wellbeing
item.description: Samsung announced that a revamped Health app is on the way to users, highlighting a host of new features.
item.author: nickodiaz@sbcglobal.net (Nickolas Diaz)
item.dc:creator: Nickolas Diaz

media:content.media:description: The Samsung Galaxy Watch 8.
media:content.media:text: The Samsung Galaxy Watch 8.
media:content.media:title: The Samsung Galaxy Watch 8.

item.title: Cricket Wireless launches huge sale on Android phones — score a free Samsung Galaxy A37, Moto G Stylus, and more
item.description: Cricket Wireless has some pretty exceptional deals for folks who add a line with an eligible unlimited plan on the carrier's site.
item.author: patrick.farmer@futurenet.com (Patrick Farmer)
item.dc:creator: Patrick Farmer

media:content.media:description: Moto G Stylus 2025 cameras
media:content.media:text: Moto G Stylus 2025 cameras
media:content.media:title: Moto G Stylus 2025 cameras

item.title: Google gets a dose of social media with 'Search Profiles' to capture new audiences
item.description: Google rolls out "Search Profiles," giving users a touch of social media in their Discover feed for videos and more.
item.author: nickodiaz@sbcglobal.net (Nickolas Diaz)
item.dc:creator: Nickolas Diaz

media:content.media:description: Google's Search Profiles.
media:content.media:text: Google's Search Profiles.
media:content.media:title: Google's Search Profiles.

item.title: Meta killed its most popular workout app, but Supernatural is coming back, and this time Meta isn't in charge
item.description: Supernatural has been the biggest VR workout app since its 2020 launch, and its original founders are bringing it back from the dead after Meta's big betrayal.
item.dc:creator: Nicholas Sutrich

media:content.media:description: One controller mode for Supernatural on the Meta Quest 2
media:content.media:text: One controller mode for Supernatural on the Meta Quest 2
media:content.media:title: One controller mode for Supernatural on the Meta Quest 2

item.title: Need a new phone for your summer travel plans? These are the Android devices you should consider in 2026
item.description: Planning your summer vacation plans? Don't forget to bring along one of these Android phones as a companion.
item.author: patrick.farmer@futurenet.com (Patrick Farmer)
item.dc:creator: Patrick Farmer

media:content.media:description: Taking a photo of peach blossoms with a Samsung Galaxy S26 Ultra
media:content.media:text: Taking a photo of peach blossoms with a Samsung Galaxy S26 Ultra
media:content.media:title: Taking a photo of peach blossoms with a Samsung Galaxy S26 Ultra

item.title: I just started testing the Oura Ring 5, and it's so thin I keep forgetting I'm wearing it
item.description: After just a few days with the Oura Ring 5, I'm completely amazed at how thin and light it is compared to its predecessors.
item.author: shruti.shekar@futurenet.com (Shruti Shekar)
item.dc:creator: Shruti Shekar

media:content.media:description: Oura Ring 5
media:content.media:text: Oura Ring 5
media:content.media:title: Oura Ring 5

item.title: Some of the cheapest Android phones are finally joining the Gemini era
item.description: Gemini is finally rolling out to Android Go phones, bringing smarter AI, richer features, and a much-needed upgrade for budget users who’ve been waiting far too long.
item.author: techkritiko@gmail.com (Jay Bonggolto)
item.dc:creator: Jay Bonggolto

media:content.media:description: The Google Gemini app
media:content.media:text: The Google Gemini app
media:content.media:title: The Google Gemini app

item.title: Amazon clears the air about its AI-generated images when you're trying to find a specific product
item.description: Amazon announced a set of visual search features, and its AI-generated images are the most questionable.
item.author: nickodiaz@sbcglobal.net (Nickolas Diaz)
item.dc:creator: Nickolas Diaz

media:content.media:description: Amazon's search will display AI generated images to try and "help" users find products.
media:content.media:text: Amazon's search will display AI generated images to try and "help" users find products.
media:content.media:title: Amazon's search will display AI generated images to try and "help" users find products.

item.title: Google Home's latest update brings AI 'Memory' for your fur babies at home
item.description: Google Home keeps its streak, rolls out "Pet Memory" and feature expansions to more users.
item.author: nickodiaz@sbcglobal.net (Nickolas Diaz)
item.dc:creator: Nickolas Diaz

media:content.media:description: The new Google Home device management UI on a Google Pixel Fold
media:content.media:text: The new Google Home device management UI on a Google Pixel Fold
media:content.media:title: The new Google Home device management UI on a Google Pixel Fold

item.title: I finally found a Gemini feature I love, and it's changed my whole morning routine
item.description: Gemini promises to be a more personal assistant, and while chat prompts are cool, Daily Brief is the truly personal tool I've been waiting for.
item.dc:creator: Nicholas Sutrich

media:content.media:description: Gemini Daily Brief on an unfolded Honor Magic V6
media:content.media:text: Gemini Daily Brief on an unfolded Honor Magic V6
media:content.media:title: Gemini Daily Brief on an unfolded Honor Magic V6

item.title: After this database listing, it looks like the 'Galaxy Z Fold 8 Ultra' is for real
item.description: An important certification for a "Galaxy Z Fold 8 Ultra" might've just cemented its existence.
item.author: nickodiaz@sbcglobal.net (Nickolas Diaz)
item.dc:creator: Nickolas Diaz

media:content.media:description: Back of Samsung Galaxy Z Fold 7 on deck ledge
media:content.media:text: Back of Samsung Galaxy Z Fold 7 on deck ledge
media:content.media:title: Back of Samsung Galaxy Z Fold 7 on deck ledge

item.title: This Fitbit Air hack lets you turn your analog wristwatch into a smartwatch
item.description: An odd Fitbit Air hack has been spotted in the wild, which lets you convert your analog wristwatch into a smart one without the awkwardness of "double-wristing" watches.
item.author: namerah.saud-fatmi@futurenet.com (Namerah Saud Fatmi)
item.dc:creator: Namerah Saud Fatmi

media:content.media:description: Google Fitbit Air band with an analogue watch

media:content.media:title: Google Fitbit Air band with an analogue watch

item.title: Google opens the Fitbit Air to creativity: now you can make your own bands
item.description: Google opened the design guidelines for the Fitbit Air, meaning designers can create bands and accessories for the fitness tracker.
item.author: nickodiaz@sbcglobal.net (Nickolas Diaz)
item.dc:creator: Nickolas Diaz

media:content.media:description: The Fitbit Air on the corner of a couch
media:content.media:text: The Fitbit Air on the corner of a couch
media:content.media:title: The Fitbit Air on the corner of a couch

item.title: Verizon quietly launches deal that gets you a free Google Pixel 10 Pro AND $100 gift card — they will even waive the activation fee
item.description: Add a line with an eligible unlimited plan and Verizon will give you a free Google Pixel 10 Pro and $100 gift card, just for kicks.
item.author: patrick.farmer@futurenet.com (Patrick Farmer)
item.dc:creator: Patrick Farmer

media:content.media:description: The back of the jade Google Pixel 10 Pro
media:content.media:text: The back of the jade Google Pixel 10 Pro
media:content.media:title: The back of the jade Google Pixel 10 Pro

item.title: Samsung's getting fit: early rumors spark Galaxy Fit 4 interest, but launch will have to wait
item.description: Rumors suggest consumers could get another dose of Samsung's Galaxy Fit tracker series later this year.
item.author: nickodiaz@sbcglobal.net (Nickolas Diaz)
item.dc:creator: Nickolas Diaz

media:content.media:description: Samsung Galaxy Fit 3
media:content.media:text: Samsung Galaxy Fit 3
media:content.media:title: Samsung Galaxy Fit 3

item.title: I tested the ZimaCube 2, and it is the homelab NAS upgrade you want
item.description: The ZimaCube 2 is a high-end NAS system with an extensive feature-set and all the connectivity you need. If you're using a NAS and are looking to upgrade, this is the one to buy.
item.author: harish.jonnalagadda@futurenet.com (Harish Jonnalagadda)
item.dc:creator: Harish Jonnalagadda

media:content.media:description: ZimaCube 2 6-bay NAS review on Android Central
media:content.media:text: ZimaCube 2 6-bay NAS review on Android Central
media:content.media:title: ZimaCube 2 6-bay NAS review on Android Central

item.title: Apple's rumored iPhone 18 anti-theft feature is already on Android, and you should enable it ASAP
item.description: Apple is rumored to be copying Google's powerful anti-theft protection for the iPhone 18 and iOS 27, and Android users can already take advantage of those great features.
item.dc:creator: Nicholas Sutrich

media:content.media:description: A person holding a Google Pixel 10 Pro XL that's about to get snatched
media:content.media:text: A person holding a Google Pixel 10 Pro XL that's about to get snatched
media:content.media:title: A person holding a Google Pixel 10 Pro XL that's about to get snatched

item.title: I used the Xiaomi 17T Pro, and it is the camera and battery powerhouse you need in 2026
item.description: I used the Xiaomi 17T Pro, and it is a camera and battery powerhouse. If you don't want to shell out close to $1,500 towards a true flagship, this is the best alternative.
item.author: harish.jonnalagadda@futurenet.com (Harish Jonnalagadda)
item.dc:creator: Harish Jonnalagadda

media:content.media:description: Xiaomi 17T Pro rear view against a colorful craft sheet highlighting the design
media:content.media:text: Xiaomi 17T Pro rear view against a colorful craft sheet highlighting the design
media:content.media:title: Xiaomi 17T Pro rear view against a colorful craft sheet highlighting the design

item.title: Google's got a quick Android 17 Beta 4.1 rolling out to address issues before launch
item.description: Google's Android 17 received a Beta 4.1 patch for enrolled testers ahead of its expected debut in mid-2026.
item.author: nickodiaz@sbcglobal.net (Nickolas Diaz)
item.dc:creator: Nickolas Diaz

media:content.media:description: The Android 17 logo on an Honor Magic V5
media:content.media:text: The Android 17 logo on an Honor Magic V5
media:content.media:title: The Android 17 logo on an Honor Magic V5

item.title: I wore James Bond's smart glasses featured in 007 First Light, and now you can too
item.description: How well do display smart glasses work? Even Realities G2 does things differently, including a smart ring for gesture control that even James Bond loves.
item.dc:creator: Nicholas Sutrich

media:content.media:credit: 007 First Light by IO Interactive / Edit by Nicholas Sutrich at Android Central
media:content.media:description: Nicholas Sutrich wearing Even Realities G2 smart glasses in a screenshot with James Bond holding the smart glasses in the 007 First Light game
media:content.media:text: Nicholas Sutrich wearing Even Realities G2 smart glasses in a screenshot with James Bond holding the smart glasses in the 007 First Light game
media:content.media:title: Nicholas Sutrich wearing Even Realities G2 smart glasses in a screenshot with James Bond holding the smart glasses in the 007 First Light game

item.title: Hate everything Google is doing right now? This Android-powered phone is paradoxically what you need
item.description: The Fairphone 6 is Murena's latest attempt at giving Android users more control over their smartphone data, and it's designed to stick around for years.
item.dc:creator: Nicholas Sutrich

media:content.media:description: The advanced privacy widget on a Fairphone 6 running Murena /e/os
media:content.media:text: The advanced privacy widget on a Fairphone 6 running Murena /e/os
media:content.media:title: The advanced privacy widget on a Fairphone 6 running Murena /e/os

item.title: Meta AI was used to steal many high-profile Instagram accounts, and people want answers
item.description: Meta's AI was reportedly responsible for aiding hackers in stealing user Instagram accounts, as no human workers are part of the process.
item.author: nickodiaz@sbcglobal.net (Nickolas Diaz)
item.dc:creator: Nickolas Diaz

media:content.media:description: Meta AI introduces the Muse Spark LLM.
media:content.media:text: Meta AI introduces the Muse Spark LLM.
media:content.media:title: Meta AI introduces the Muse Spark LLM.

item.title: Android's big June Drop keeps kids safe this summer, adds 'Fake Call' protections for phones
item.description: A big June Android Drop is on the way to phones this week, and Google detailed safety features for kids, call protections for phones, and more.
item.author: nickodiaz@sbcglobal.net (Nickolas Diaz)
item.dc:creator: Nickolas Diaz

item.title: Google's June Android Drop turns your phone into a smarter shopping and reading companion
item.description: Google’s latest Android Drop packs smarter outfit search, an AI-powered digital wardrobe, enhanced reading tools, and new emoji mashups.

media:content.media:description: Two Amazon Prime boxes

item.title: Motorola Edge 2026 and Moto Buds 2 double down on comfort, battery life, and practicality
item.description: Motorola’s Edge 2026 skips the AI hype and focuses on what matters: a lighter design, bright display, solid cameras, long battery life, and surprisingly capable Moto Buds 2.
item.author: techkritiko@gmail.com (Jay Bonggolto)
item.dc:creator: Jay Bonggolto

media:content.media:description: An official lifestyle image of someone holding the green Motorola Edge 2026
media:content.media:text: An official lifestyle image of someone holding the green Motorola Edge 2026
media:content.media:title: An official lifestyle image of someone holding the green Motorola Edge 2026

item.title: The 'best budget flip phone' of 2026 is already FREE at T-Mobile — here's the deal
item.description: The Motorola Razr (2026) just dropped on May 21st, but you can already grab the clamshell device for FREE when you add a line with an eligible data plan at T-Mobile.
item.author: patrick.farmer@futurenet.com (Patrick Farmer)
item.dc:creator: Patrick Farmer

media:content.media:description: The Motorola Razr 2026 in the Pantone Hematite colorway.
media:content.media:text: The Motorola Razr 2026 in the Pantone Hematite colorway.
media:content.media:title: The Motorola Razr 2026 in the Pantone Hematite colorway.

item.title: Samsung is changing how you turn off your Galaxy in One UI 9 for your protection
item.description: Samsung was spotted adding changes to the power-off process of phones in One UI 9, and it has the users' security in mind.
item.author: nickodiaz@sbcglobal.net (Nickolas Diaz)
item.dc:creator: Nickolas Diaz

media:content.media:description: A vibrant wallpaper on the Samsung Galaxy S26 Ultra
media:content.media:text: A vibrant wallpaper on the Samsung Galaxy S26 Ultra
media:content.media:title: A vibrant wallpaper on the Samsung Galaxy S26 Ultra

item.title: A Pixel Watch 5 may have leaked from the most unlikely place yet
item.description: An alleged Pixel Watch 5 surfaced from the ocean with key specs on display, turning a bizarre scuba-diving find into one of Google’s strangest leaks yet.
item.author: techkritiko@gmail.com (Jay Bonggolto)
item.dc:creator: Jay Bonggolto

media:content.media:description: Close-up of the Google Pixel Watch 4 showing the current mileage, duration, HR, zone, and pace for a run activity.
media:content.media:text: Close-up of the Google Pixel Watch 4 showing the current mileage, duration, HR, zone, and pace for a run activity.
media:content.media:title: Close-up of the Google Pixel Watch 4 showing the current mileage, duration, HR, zone, and pace for a run activity.

item.title: 4 Google Health app customizations I use to make the app truly personal
item.description: The Fitbit app is being overhauled as part of a Google Health rebrand. Longtime users aren't happy with the change, but these tips will help.
item.author: bradypsnyder@gmail.com (Brady Snyder)
item.dc:creator: Brady Snyder

media:content.media:description: The Fitbit Air in a Lavender band and the Google Health app settings.
media:content.media:text: The Fitbit Air in a Lavender band and the Google Health app settings.
